---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report problems or suggest improvements for documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

## Documentation Section
Which documentation needs improvement?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Getting Started Guide (/core/documentation/human/getting-started.md)
- [ ] System Overview (/core/documentation/human/readme-overview.md)
- [ ] System Spec (/core/documentation/ai/system-spec.md)
- [ ] Agent Mission (/core/documentation/ai/agent-mission.md)
- [ ] Evolution Logic (/core/documentation/ai/evolution-logic.md)
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Code Comments
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## Issue Type
- [ ] Information is missing
- [ ] Information is incorrect
- [ ] Information is outdated
- [ ] Information is unclear
- [ ] Example code doesn't work
- [ ] Typo or grammatical error
- [ ] Suggestion for improvement

## Location
- **File**: [e.g., /core/documentation/human/getting-started.md]
- **Section**: [e.g., "Installation & Setup"]
- **Line Number** (if applicable): [e.g., line 42]

## What's Wrong?
Describe what's incorrect, missing, or unclear.

## Suggested Fix
If you know what the documentation should say, please suggest the correction.

## Additional Context
- Is this blocking you from using a feature?
- Did you find a workaround?
- Are there examples that would help clarify this?

## Examples/Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or examples to help explain the issue.
